memory:memory/2026-04-02.md:119:130.snippet: - **"One tool owns deployment"**: Terraform owns `google_cloud_run_v2_service` — env vars, secrets, scaling. Cloud Build only does docker build+push. User needs to: run `terraform-plan.yml` via workflow_dispatch to verify secrets are wired correctly 2. After plan passes, run `terraform-apply.yml` to actually deploy 3. memory:memory/2026-04-02.md:96:120.snippet: - **Secrets** (sensitive values): GitHub → Settings → Environments → `{env}` → Secrets - `PROD_GITHUB_TOKEN`, `PROD_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`, `PROD_POSTGRES_PASSWORD`, `PROD_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID`, `PROD_GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET`, `PROD_JWT_SECRET`, `PROD_FRONTEND_URL` - **Environment variables** (non-secret config): Same GitHub environment → Variables section - `WIF_PROVIDER`, `WIF_SERVICE_ACCOUNT`, `PROD_FRONTEND_URL` - **Workflow YAML** (env-specific non-secret config): hardcoded in workflow `env:` block - CPU, memory, instance counts, region, allowed origins, etc. ### Workflow Files Created - `.github/workflows/terraform-plan.yml` — plan on PR + manual `workflow_dispatch` trigger - `.github/wor

memory:memory/2026-04-03.md:1:27.snippet: # 2026-04-03 — resume-customizer ## alignment_matrix Fix Day ### What happened Multiple attempts to capture a Skills Review screenshot via Playwright UI navigation — all failed. Root cause: Playwright's `fill()` on the job description textarea (`aria-label="Or paste job description manually"`) sets the DOM value but Streamlit's reactive model doesn't register it as a session_state change. `st.session_state.job_description` stays empty → "Start Workflow" does nothing. ### Key findings - **Port 8501 conflict**: Multiple old Streamlit processes accumulate. Kill all before restarting. - **Orchestrator**: Works correctly with real LLM. `live_llm_test.py` runs end-to-end and produces PDF. - **a
